---
title: 'Job&#39;s Land Photos'
date: '2013-10-07T06:03:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '403243237200137393'
blogger_filename: '/2013/10/job-land-photos.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Job Research'
  - 'Job'
---

Various Photos gathered through Google Search of Edom (Also known as Idumea) the land of Job.<br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sinai-peninsula-550-6acbf913b621.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="246" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sinai-peninsula-550-97df7af8cca2.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ancient-egypt-map1-5a16de482143.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="400" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ancient-egypt-map1-da956a80ba5c.jpg" width="396" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/edom-f9279af28b30.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="400" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/edom-d3df230eac81.jpg" width="334" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/idumeapostexilic-30a3c1ea0907.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="300" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/idumeapostexilic-38f73ffc320b.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/4-abraham-journey-2l-0930fe650e03.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="371" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/4-abraham-journey-2l-3f5772e532b4.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/8b-jacobs-journeys-large-10039c2c97e1.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="400" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/8b-jacobs-journeys-large-9b5bf0ad158c.jpg" width="308" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/abrahamsjourney-008a7346c26a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="282" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/abrahamsjourney-27198020e04a.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/map-ancient-near-east-4e0d134fc60a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="312" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/map-ancient-near-east-17c36101232b.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><br /><br /><br /><br /><span id="goog_2029501477"></span><span id="goog_2029501478"></span><br />
